items.name: Krisp Accent Converter for YouTube
items.tagline: YouTube, but you clearly understand everyone
items.description: YouTube has speed control, captions, auto-translate — but no accent control. Now it does. Free Chrome extension, on-device AI, one toggle.

items.name: Luma Agents
items.tagline: Agents that plan, iterate, + refine w/ full creative context
items.description: AI agents that plan, generate, and iterate across video, image, and audio in one pipeline. Brand campaigns, product visuals, social ads, video localisation with shared context end-to-end. For creative teams and agencies.

items.name: Cleo Labs
items.tagline: Automate global compliance  for selling physical products
items.description: Selling physical products globally? A single item can trigger 100+ regulations across materials, labeling, certifications, and customs and every rule changes from one country to the next. Cleo maps your full regulatory perimeter automatically. Our multi-agent AI pipeline (MARIA) scans 19,000+ authorities in 106 countries and delivers structured compliance maps, verified by legal experts, not hallucinated by a chatbot.)

items.name: Skills Janitor
items.tagline: Find which Claude Code skills you actually use
items.description: 9 commands that audit, deduplicate, lint, fix, and track your claude code skills. shows you what's broken, what overlaps, and what you never touch. free. open source.

items.name: showmd
items.tagline: Markdown was never meant to be previewed plain text
items.description: Ever asked yourself why all of those SKILL.md files are rendered in plain text in MacOS Preview? showmd is a free, native macOS Quick Look extension that renders Markdown beautifully. YAML frontmatter parsed into a collapsible metadata table — collapsed by default, one click to expand. No other viewer does this. Agentic AI XML tags — and 17 more — rendered as labeled, bordered blocks instead of raw angle brackets.

items.name: ContextPool
items.tagline: Persistent memory for AI coding agents
items.description: Every AI coding session starts from scratch. You re-debug the same bugs, re-explain decisions you already made. Your agent forgets everything. ContextPool gives your agent persistent memory. It scans your past Cursor and Claude Code sessions, extracts engineering insights (bugs, fixes, design decisions, gotchas), and loads relevant context via MCP at session start. No prompting needed. Works with Claude code, Cursor, Windsurf, and Kiro. Free and open source - team sync available for $7.99/mo.

items.name: Clarm
items.tagline: AI inbound layer to capture, qualify, and route leads
items.description: Capture inbound visitors, qualify buyer intent with AI, and route revenue 24/7 across web chat, Slack, Discord, GitHub, and email. SOC 2 Type II and HIPAA compliant. Y Combinator backed.

items.name: Deconflict
items.tagline: Plan your WiFi and see through walls
items.description: Free, open-source WiFi planner that runs in your browser. Drop a floorplan, place access points from 100+ real models, and see signal coverage through walls in real time. Each wall material has realistic RF attenuation. Glass, brick, concrete all behave differently. Channels are assigned automatically, and a 3-stage optimizer finds ideal AP placement. No account, no install, no subscription.

items.name: VoxCPM2
items.tagline: Open-source 48kHz TTS with voice design and cloning
items.description: VoxCPM2 is a 2B open-source TTS model with 30-language support, 48kHz output, voice design from text alone, controllable voice cloning, and real-time streaming fast enough for production voice workflows.

items.name: SigmaMind MCP
items.tagline: Build and control voice AI agents via MCP
items.description: SigmaMind's MCP server exposes your entire voice AI stack as tools – agents, calls, campaigns, webhooks, phone numbers – manageable directly from your MCP client or IDE. Spin up agents, trigger test calls, debug with inline call records, and automate deployments without leaving your editor. Sub-800ms latency, SOTA noise cancellation, VAD, IVR navigation, and voicemail detection handled out of the box.

sample_reviews.text: I like it so far i guess

This app never works, I’ve done everything correctly to download onto HP laptop as well as my IPhone. When I reached out to them they said to follow the instructions for troubleshooting, which I have already done.
I tried my hardest to get this to work but it kept saying I connected but it kept sending me to the connect page AND DIDNT EVEN CONNECT

Things started pretty well at first, then the next day, I had to restart my phone to get the app to connect again.

Then, after a few seconds, the app stopped working again. I haven’t tried restarting the phone again because if that’s what it takes to make it work, I’ll have to find something more r
